title: NC 03-26 Tank Monitoring System
managementComment: Independent UTI measurements shall be used at all times to verify tank level readings during cargo operations, particularly when approaching critical filling limits, to ensure safe control and prevent overfilling. The crew must check between the Tank Monitoring System indications and manual measurements during cargo loading. Crew should identify the reasons for the incorrect measurements and decide with technical superintendent how to rectify it. Until permanent rectification is completed, manual verification remains a compulsory control measure for all cargo operations.
